## Description

Explain what this PR does and why. If it fixes a bug, describe the root cause. If it adds a feature, describe what it enables.

Closes #<!-- issue number, if applicable -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / code cleanup
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## How Has This Been Tested?

Describe how you verified your changes work. Include the endpoints you tested, example request bodies, or any relevant output.

## Checklist

- [ ] The project builds without errors (`./mvnw clean verify`)
- [ ] My changes follow the existing code style and architecture
- [ ] I have updated the README if I added or changed any API endpoints
- [ ] I have not introduced any breaking changes (or noted them below)

## Breaking Changes

List any breaking changes here, or write "None".

## Notes for Reviewer

Anything you want to flag: design decisions, areas of uncertainty, or things you'd like specific feedback on.
